programs.title: How To Lose Weight Well 3
programs.desc: Another installment of the program in which Dr. Xand van Tullekenem and the world-famous dietitian Hala El-Shafie help participants lose excess weight using diets prepared especially for them.A doctor checks whether the bacteria in our gut may actually be the key to weight loss, tests the popular DASH diet and assists a pair of gym friends who want to lose weight.Viewers will also learn interesting facts about, among others:Gwyneth Paltrow's cleansing diet, the weight loss plan proposed by the British Health Service, the impact of alcohol on our weight and interesting gadgets for fitness exercises.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me: Supersized 20
programs.desc: Another edition of the culinary show in which amateur chefs organize a party and invite the other participants of the program.Each cooking enthusiast is subject to strict assessment of his guests.

programs.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programs.desc: Real estate agents accompanied by cameras show clients around the most expensive and amazing properties.Buyers have unlimited funds and are very demanding.
